title: ferray-linalg: tensorsolve ignores axes parameter
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

tensorsolve() in solve.rs accepts _axes: Option<&[usize]> but ignores it (underscore prefix). NumPy's tensorsolve uses the axes parameter to move specified axes of a to the right before reshaping and solving. This means ferray's tensorsolve will produce wrong results when axes is not None.
